zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune於1234年9月3日出生在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特安古利e時，他的父親Count Hugh de Lusignan XI13歲，母親Yolande of Brittany16歲。他於1254年1月29日與Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年8月25日享年35歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特拉 庫洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune于1234年9月3日出生在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特安古利e时，他的父亲Count Hugh de Lusignan XI13岁，母亲Yolande of Brittany16岁。他于1254年1月29日与Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年8月25日享年35岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特拉 庫洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune was born on 3 September 1234, in Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Count Hugh de Lusignan XI, was 13 and his mother, Yolande of Brittany, was 16. He married Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche on 29 January 1254, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 August 1270, at the age of 35, and was buried in La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune est né le 3 septembre 1234, à Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Count Hugh de Lusignan XI, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Yolande of Brittany, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche le 29 janvier 1254, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 août 1270, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune am 3. September 1234 in Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Hugh de Lusignan XI 13 und seine Mutter Yolande of Brittany 16. Er hat am 29. Januar 1254 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. August 1270 im Alter von 35 Jahren und wurde in La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune è nato il il 3 settembre 1234 nel Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Count Hugh de Lusignan XI, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Yolande of Brittany, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche il 29 gennaio 1254, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 agosto 1270, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan XII, Bruneが1234年9月3日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントアンゴウルeメで生まれた時，父Count Hugh de Lusignan XIは13歳，母Yolande of Brittanyは16歳であった。1254年1月29日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンでJeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年8月25日に35歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントラ コウロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune(이)가 1234년 9월 3일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트 앤굴e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Hugh de Lusignan XI(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande of Brittany(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1254년 1월 29일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 8월 25일 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 라 쿠론에 묻혔다.

mn.3 September 1234–25 August 1270: 1234 оны Есдүгээр сарын 3–1270 оны Наймдугаар сарын 25

pt.3 September 1234–25 August 1270: 3 de setembro de 1234–25 de agosto de 1270
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune nasceu em 3 de setembro de 1234, em Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Count Hugh de Lusignan XI, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Yolande of Brittany, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche em 29 de janeiro de 1254, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1270, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune родился 3 сентября 1234 г. в местности ангоулeм, чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Hugh de Lusignan XI было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande of Brittany, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche 29 января 1254 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 августа 1270 г. в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности ла коуронн, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.3 September 1234–25 August 1270: 3 de septiembre de 1234–25 de agosto de 1270
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune nació el 3 de septiembre de 1234, en Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Count Hugh de Lusignan XI, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Yolande of Brittany, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche el 29 de enero de 1254, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1270, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
